business_description.description: What the product does, the problem it solves, and who it currently serves

crm_data_summary.description: Summary of CRM win/loss data, top customer attributes, and churn patterns. Can be a narrative or structured text.

target_market.description: High-level market description, e.g., 'mid-market B2B SaaS companies in North America'

known_best_customers.description: List of company names or domains that represent the best current customers
